resources.label: The Vague Prompt
resources.instruction: Open Claude in a new tab. Copy and paste this prompt and run it. Read the output.
resources.content: Why did the moon mission fail?
resources.note: Notice how generic and unfocused the response is. This is your Minion with no guidance.

resources.label: The Good Prompt
resources.instruction: Now copy and paste this structured prompt in the same chat and run it. Compare the two outputs.
resources.content:
You are a data-driven mission analyst.

GRU's moon heist failed after Vector stole the shrink ray mid-mission. The operation had a solid plan but collapsed at the execution stage. The team of 12 Minions was well equipped but the mission had no contingency plan when the primary objective was compromised.

Analyze why the moon mission failed and identify the 3 key lessons GRU must apply to avoid the same mistakes on the next mission.

Present as a numbered list. Each lesson gets a name, one sentence explanation, and one specific action GRU should take differently.

Be direct and specific. Focus only on actionable lessons. Avoid repeating the same point in different words.

breakdown.highlight: You are a data-driven mission analyst.
breakdown.explanation: Tells the AI who to be. Changes how it thinks, not just what it says.

breakdown.highlight: GRU's moon heist failed after Vector stole the shrink ray mid-mission...
breakdown.explanation: Gives the AI the background it needs. Without this, every answer is generic.

breakdown.highlight: Analyze why the moon mission failed and identify the 3 key lessons...
breakdown.explanation: Tells the AI exactly what to do. Specific tasks produce specific results.

breakdown.highlight: Present as a numbered list. Each lesson gets a name, one sentence explanation, and one specific action...
breakdown.explanation: Designs the output shape before asking the question. Format determines usability.

breakdown.highlight: Be direct and specific. Focus only on actionable lessons. Avoid repeating the same point in different words.
breakdown.explanation: Sets the rules. Boundaries produce precision.

resources.note: Same Minion. Same topic. Completely different output. That is the power of a structured prompt.

resources.label: L0 — Raw Ask
resources.concept_intro: Type whatever comes to mind. No structure. No awareness. Pure instinct. You will always start here, even if briefly. The output is vague, generic, and barely usable — and that is precisely the point.

try_prompt.instruction: Open a new chat. Run this as your starting point. This is your baseline.
try_prompt.content: Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.

resources.label: L1 — Specificity
resources.concept_intro: Replace vague words with precise ones. Add numbers. Name the exact target and timeline. Non-negotiable for any real mission.

try_prompt.instruction: Add numbers and exact targets. Run it and compare to L0.
try_prompt.content: Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: exact number (5), named the mission, set a timeline (6 months)

resources.label: L2 — Role
resources.concept_intro: Assign the AI an expert identity before the task. The role changes how it thinks, not just what it says. A mission strategist reasons very differently from a helpful assistant.
resources.added_highlight: You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience and a working knowledge of orbital mechanics. You design theatrical but technically achievable plans, in the spirit of the Moon Heist (2010).

try_prompt.instruction: Add the role before your ask. Run it and compare to L1.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience and a working knowledge of orbital mechanics. You design theatrical but technically achievable plans, in the spirit of the Moon Heist (2010).

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: expert role with specific background and reference to the Moon Heist

resources.label: L3 — Context
resources.concept_intro: Tell the AI about your world — your team, your constraints, your history, what has been tried and failed. This is the single biggest upgrade from generic output to something that knows your situation.
resources.added_highlight: Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. I run a lab with 400 Minions — enthusiastic but easily distracted by bananas. The Anti-Villain League is watching. In 2010 I stole the Moon but returned it for my daughters. Vector is racing me to the Sun. Any plan must be quiet, school-night-friendly, and conclude before bedtime.

try_prompt.instruction: Add context about your world. Run it and compare to L2.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. I run a lab with 400 Minions — enthusiastic but easily distracted by bananas. The Anti-Villain League is watching. In 2010 I stole the Moon but returned it for my daughters. Vector is racing me to the Sun. The Sun is 5,500 degrees C — handling protocols matter. Any plan must be quiet, school-night-friendly, and conclude before bedtime.

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: who we are, what has failed before, who is competing, real operational constraints

resources.label: L4 — Output Format
resources.concept_intro: Specify exactly how the answer should look. Format must match how the output will actually be used. A great plan in the wrong format is still unusable.
resources.added_highlight: Format as a table with columns: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count Needed | Difficulty (1-5) | Estimated Time | Daughter-Approved? Add a one-line why this could work under each row.

try_prompt.instruction: Add your format instruction. Run it and compare to L3.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. I run a lab with 400 Minions — enthusiastic but easily distracted by bananas. The Anti-Villain League is watching. In 2010 I stole the Moon but returned it for my daughters. Vector is racing me to the Sun. Any plan must be quiet, school-night-friendly, and conclude before bedtime.

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.

Format as a table with columns: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count Needed | Difficulty (1-5) | Estimated Time | Daughter-Approved? Add a one-line why this could work under each row.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: exact output structure — a table with specific columns and row annotations

resources.label: L5 — Constraints
resources.concept_intro: Explicit rules — what to include, what to avoid, what to prioritize. Good prompting is about saying NO as much as saying YES. Especially when yes could scorch a continent.
resources.added_highlight:
Constraints:
- Total budget under 50M
- Completable within 6 months
- No permanent damage to Earth — daughters live here
- No weaponized freeze rays — AVL is monitoring those
- Average global temperature drop must stay under 2 degrees during the operation
- Each plan description must be under 40 words
- Tone: professional villain memo, not cartoonish

try_prompt.instruction: Add your constraints. Run it and compare to L4. This is your complete structured prompt.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. I run a lab with 400 Minions — enthusiastic but easily distracted by bananas. The Anti-Villain League is watching. In 2010 I stole the Moon but returned it for my daughters. Vector is racing me to the Sun. Any plan must be quiet, school-night-friendly, and conclude before bedtime.

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun, executed within 6 months.

Format as a table with columns: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count Needed | Difficulty (1-5) | Estimated Time | Daughter-Approved? Add a one-line why this could work under each row.

Constraints:
- Total budget under 50M
- Completable within 6 months
- No permanent damage to Earth — daughters live here
- No weaponized freeze rays — AVL is monitoring those
- Average global temperature drop must stay under 2 degrees during the operation
- Each plan description must be under 40 words
- Tone: professional villain memo, not cartoonish
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: budget cap, timeline, safety rules, word limit, tone — everything that turns a good idea into a shippable plan

resources.label: L6 — Few-Shot Examples
resources.concept_intro: Show the AI what a great output looks like before asking for one. It calibrates to your standard, not its own default. Most powerful once you know what good looks like.

try_prompt.instruction: Add a gold-standard example before your ask. Run it and see how the quality shifts.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. 400 Minions, AVL watching, Vector racing, daughters at home, Sun is 5,500 degrees C.

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun.

Format as a table with columns: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count Needed | Difficulty (1-5) | Estimated Time | Daughter-Approved? Add a one-line why this could work under each row.

Constraints: budget under 50M, 6-month window, no permanent Earth damage, no freeze rays, global temperature drop under 2 degrees, each plan under 40 words, professional villain memo tone.

Here is a plan I consider gold-standard:

The Moon Heist (GRU, 2010): Stole the actual Moon using a shrink ray. Theatrical, symbolic, technically dazzling, reversible — returned it for my daughters. The plan worked because it was iconic, had emotional stakes, had a clean exit, and made a great story afterward.

Now give me 5 more Sun-heist plans at that quality level.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: a concrete example of what great looks like — the AI now calibrates to that standard

resources.label: L7 — Chain of Thought
resources.concept_intro: Ask the AI to reason through the problem before answering. Separating thinking from responding unlocks dramatically deeper and more coherent outputs.

try_prompt.instruction: Ask the AI to think first, then answer. Run it and notice how the reasoning shapes the response.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. 400 Minions, AVL watching, Vector racing, daughters at home, Sun is 5,500 degrees C.

Before giving me the 5 Sun-heist plans, first reason through:
1. What made the Moon Heist succeed and what made it feel hollow afterward?
2. What patterns is the AVL looking for since 2010?
3. What emotional payoff am I actually optimizing for now that I have three daughters?

Then with that reasoning visible, give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun.

Format as a table: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count | Difficulty (1-5) | Time | Daughter-Approved?

Constraints: budget under 50M, 6 months, no permanent Earth damage, temp drop under 2 degrees, each plan under 40 words, professional villain memo tone.
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: explicit reasoning step before the answer — forces structured thinking before responding

resources.label: L8 — Self-Critique
resources.concept_intro: Ask the AI to evaluate its own output against specific criteria before delivering it. You get a reviewed answer, not a first draft.

try_prompt.instruction: Ask the AI to grade and fix its own answer. Run it and compare the quality.
try_prompt.content:
You are a veteran super-villain strategist with 30 years of audacious-heist experience.

Context: I am Chief Strategist of 1inMINION. 400 Minions, AVL watching, Vector racing, daughters at home, Sun is 5,500 degrees C.

Give me 5 plans for Operation: Steal the Sun.

Format as a table: Plan Name | Capture Method | Minion Count | Difficulty (1-5) | Time | Daughter-Approved?

Constraints: budget under 50M, 6 months, no permanent Earth damage, temp drop under 2 degrees, each plan under 40 words, professional villain memo tone.

After giving the 5 plans:
- Score each on: iconic-ness, reversibility, AVL detection risk, daughter-approval probability
- Identify the weakest plan
- Replace it with a stronger one
- Briefly explain what made the replacement better
try_prompt.what_changed: Added: scoring criteria, instruction to find the weakest and replace it — the AI does QA on itself
